name: Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 1 can whole kernel corn (12 oz), drained
1 small green pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a pocket in each chop, cutting from the edge almost to the bone.
2. Lightly season pockets with salt and pepper.
3. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except pork chops and tomato sauce. Pack vegetable mixture into pockets. Secure along fat side with wood
4. Pour any remaining vegetable mixture into crockpot, moisten top surface of each chop with tomato sauce. Add stuffed pork chops to crock pot stacking if necessary.
5. Pour any remaining tomato sauce on top. Cover and cook on low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
